---
title: "02 Data Wrangle"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
packages <- c("tidyverse", "lubridate", "readr", "readxl")

to_install <- packages[!packages %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"]]
if (length(to_install) > 0) install.packages(to_install)

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
```

```{r}
load_raw <- read_excel("../data_raw/load.xlsx")
temp_raw <- read_excel("../data_raw/temperature.xlsx")
rh_raw   <- read_excel("../data_raw/relative_humidity.xlsx")
template <- read_csv("../data_raw/submission_template.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

```{r}
cat("load_raw: ", dim(load_raw)[1], "rows x", dim(load_raw)[2], "cols\n")
cat("temp_raw: ", dim(temp_raw)[1], "rows x", dim(temp_raw)[2], "cols\n")
cat("rh_raw: ", dim(rh_raw)[1], "rows x", dim(rh_raw)[2], "cols\n")
cat("template: ", dim(template)[1], "rows x", dim(template)[2], "cols\n")
```

```{r}
names(load_raw)
names(temp_raw)
names(rh_raw)
names(template)
```
```{r}
head(load_raw)
head(temp_raw)
head(rh_raw)
head(template)
```

```{r}
# Daily load: average h1-h24 for each date
load_daily <- load_raw %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(load_daily = mean(c_across(starts_with("h")), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(date, load_daily)

# Daily temperature: average across stations, then across hours in a day
temp_daily <- temp_raw %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(temp_hourly_avg = mean(c_across(starts_with("t_ws")), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(temp_daily = mean(temp_hourly_avg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Daily humidity: average across stations, then across hours in a day
rh_daily <- rh_raw %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(rh_hourly_avg = mean(c_across(starts_with("rh_ws")), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(rh_daily = mean(rh_hourly_avg, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Merge all daily data
daily_data <- load_daily %>%
  left_join(temp_daily, by = "date") %>%
  left_join(rh_daily, by = "date")

# Quick check
head(daily_data)
glimpse(daily_data)

```
```{r}
# Exporting data
write_csv(daily_data, "../data_process/daily_data.csv")
```
